c74object.name: airfx.calibre~
c74object.digest: Calibre is a re-release of another old Character plugin.
c74object.description: Calibre is a re-release of another old Character plugin.
c74object.discussion: Calibre is another Character plugin, re-released in AU and VST form. This one’s got kind of a steely quality and if you hype the Character control there’s a point where bass cancels out: weird variation on a tone control! Also, that means if you duplicated the track (or used Blue Cat Patchwork or something) and flipped phase, you’d get a really unusual lowpass and would have only the bass and a lot of strange color.

method.name: about
method.digest: Get the original Airwindows "about" text for this object
method.description: Prints the original Airwindows description for this plugin out the dump outlet.
